message:
fix(db): switch PRAGMA_DB_INIT_BASE_SQL journal_mode from DELETE to WAL

The base database initialization PRAGMAs were using journal_mode =
'DELETE', which forces rollback-journal semantics. This is inconsistent
with the per-connection PRAGMAs and the main init SQL block, both of
which already use WAL mode. The mismatch meant that the first connection
to a freshly created database would set DELETE mode, and subsequent
connections would then have to upgrade to WAL, causing an unnecessary
checkpoint and potential brief lock contention.

Switching to WAL here ensures the database is created in WAL mode from
the start, matching the intent expressed everywhere else in the schema
and avoiding the DELETE->WAL transition overhead on first use. The
quoting style is also normalized (bare WAL instead of 'DELETE') to match
the other PRAGMA statements in the file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
